Tripod Passing: Beating Inside Position by Jozef Chen

Master tripod passing with BJJ strategist, Jozef Chen. Overcome opponents, boost your confidence, and elevate your game. Ideal for all skill levels!
  • Details
  • Contents

$127.00

Watch anywhere - stream or download this course on your favorite devices with the BJJ Fanatics App (App Store & Google Play)
100% Satisfaction Guarantee - If you are unhappy with this course for any reason you have 30 days to request a full refund, as long as you haven’t downloaded it yet.

See more from this instructor

See why so many Fanatics tune into the ADCC qualifier Jozef Chen's material - He is articulate and simplifies complicated positions 

  • Tripod passing is a simple and functional way to pass the guard that anyone can use and has led Jozef to winning some of the biggest tournaments 
  • Whether you're a seasoned grappler or novice, this system is easy to implement 
  • Learn an effective and modern style to guard passing 
  • Improve your confidence and performance on the mat with proven techniques.
  • See the exact techniques taught and utilized by Jozef when he competes

Check Out a Free Sample:

What will You Learn?

Elevate your Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu game with "Tripod Passing: Beating Inside Position," the latest instructional by the renowned BJJ strategist Jozef Chen. This comprehensive guide delves deep into the highly effective tripod passing technique, designed to dismantle your opponent’s inside position and advance your passing skills to a new level.

In this instructional, Jozef Chen shares his expert insights and refined techniques to help you master the tripod pass, an essential tool for overcoming the challenges posed by opponents who are adept at controlling the inside position. Whether you’re a white belt seeking to enhance your fundamentals or a seasoned practitioner aiming to refine your passing game, this video will provide you with the strategies and drills needed to excel on the mats.

What You’ll Learn:

  • Detailed Breakdown of the Tripod Pass: Understand the mechanics and principles behind the tripod pass, including key movements and positions to dominate the guard.
  • Beating the Inside Position: Learn specific techniques to neutralize and overcome the inside position, one of the most challenging obstacles in guard passing.
  • Step-by-Step Drills: Follow along with detailed drills that will help you internalize the tripod pass and integrate it into your rolling game.
  • Advanced Concepts and Troubleshooting: Gain insights into common mistakes and how to correct them, plus advanced tips to refine your technique and adapt to different opponents.

Key Features:

  • Expert Instruction: Presented by Jozef Chen, a respected figure in BJJ known for his innovative approach to guard passing.
  • High-Quality Production: Clear, high-definition video with multiple angles to ensure you see every detail of the techniques.
  • Comprehensive Coverage: From fundamental concepts to advanced applications, this instructional caters to all levels of practitioners.
  • Practical Application: Designed to be immediately applicable in live sparring and competition scenarios.

Transform your guard passing game with "Tripod Passing: Beating Inside Position" and take your BJJ skills to the next level. Perfect for practitioners at all levels who are committed to improving their technique and achieving success on the mats.

What Exactly Do You Get?

Part 1

  • Phases Of Engagement
  • Prerequisites To Pass And How The Tripod Fits In
  • How I Started To Use Tripod Passing
  • Concepts
  • 2 Phases Of Tripod Passing
  • The Skill Of Maintenance
  • Classical Tripod Intro
  • Upper Body
  • Lower Body
  • Knee Pinch & Hand Assist
  • Weight Distribution
  • Half Butterfly With Chest To Chest


Part 2

  • Lower Body In Half Butterfly
  • Crossface
  • Pulling Overhook
  • Sagging Overhook
  • Long Range Half Butterfly
  • Lower Body Butterfly Hook
  • Post Hand Side
  • Underhook Side
  • Near Side Underhook


Part 3

  • Elbow Or Hand Assist
  • Windshield Wiper
  • Elbow Assist Or Knee Pummel
  • Windshield Wipers
  • Entering Supine
  • Chest To Chest
  • Chest To Chest Half Guard
  • RDLR
  • Knee Shield Half Guard


Part 4

  • Top Side Cross Wrist
  • Auxiliary Passing Strategies
  • Dealing With Strong Wrist Grips
  • Dealing With A Strong Whizzer
  • Dealing With Extension
  • Dealing With Scoop Grips
  • Dealing With Hamstring Grip
  • Dealing With X Guard
  • Trap Smother
  • Games
  • Entry Games
  • Maintenance Games
  • Offense Games
  • Emphasis On Dialogue


Part 5

  • Entry Portion With Owen Jones
  • Maintenance Portion With Owen Jones
  • Offense Portion With Owen Jones


Part 6

  • Entry Portion With Kenta Iwamoto
  • Maintenance Portion With Kenta Iwamoto
  • Dialogue With Kenta Iwamoto
  • Offense Portion With Kenta Iwamoto
  • Outro

 

Here's What Students Are Viewing

  • Pin Escapes & Turtle Escapes: BJJ Fundamentals - Go Further Faster by John Danaher
    $197 Regular price Sale Price $98.50
    On Sale

    Pin Escapes & Turtle Escapes: BJJ Fundamentals - Go Further Faster by John Danaher

    Learn The Techniques & Concepts That Will Make You Almost Un-Submit-Able Quicker Than You (Or Your Instructor) Ever Thought Possible: Over 10 Hours Of Material 

    • The Most Complete System Of Jiu-Jitsu Fundamentals Ever Created - From The Best Instructor On Earth
    • The aim of the GO FURTHER FASTER series is twofold: First, to give you the technique and insight to get to a higher level in the sport and second, to reduce the time ordinarily taken to get there
  • Systematically Attacking From Open Guard Seated Position by Gordon Ryan
    Regular price $349

    Systematically Attacking From Open Guard Seated Position by Gordon Ryan

    The best no-gi grappler on Earth, Gordon “The King” Ryan, shares his secrets for creating action and attacking opponents from seated open guard.

    • Use Gordon’s signature moves, including the shoulder crunch sumi gaeshi, double kouchi gari, and ashi garami entries he has used at elite black belt levels
    • Learn the first half of Gordon Ryan’s seated & supine open guard system, as he shows you how anyone can use these techniques for success
  • They Shall Not Pass by Gordon Ryan
    $349 $174.50
    On Sale

    They Shall Not Pass by Gordon Ryan

    Stop getting your guard passed with these retention systems from Gordon “The King” Ryan, as he shows you his method for never giving up bad positions!
    • Gordon Ryan is the ADCC Absolute Champion and one of the best no-gi grapplers of all time, and the consensus best active no-gi grappler competing today.
  • The Half Guard Anthology by Lachlan Giles
    Regular price $79

    The Half Guard Anthology by Lachlan Giles

    Lachlan Giles is an ADCC Veteran, Pan Pacific Champion, and coach to one of the fastest rising starts, Craig Jones 

    • Lachlan Giles is here to change your entire half guard game
    • This is your opportunity to learn how to manipulate anyone from the half guard and use their weight against them
  • Butterfly Guard Rediscovered 3.0 by Adam Wardzinski
    Regular price $149

    Butterfly Guard Rediscovered 3.0 by Adam Wardzinski

    Master The Modern Butterfly Guard With Polish Grappling Champion Adam Wardzinski’s Entire System That Has Been Developed And Perfected Against Elite Black Belt Competiton! 

    • Adam Wardzinski is back with a totally updated and combined series exploring all the scoring and submission opportunities from the butterfly gaurd
    • Combine this classic guard with side butterfly, lazy butterfly, half butterfly, and more!
  • Foundations of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu by Bernardo Faria
    $99 $49.50
    On Sale

    Foundations of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu by Bernardo Faria

    Bernardo Faria is a 5x Black Belt World Champion 

    • Bernardo is considered by many the master of fundamentals
    • With this easy to learn system you will be able to develop a strong foundation
  • Weight Training For Grappling by Michael Israetel
    Regular price $29.99

    Weight Training For Grappling by Michael Israetel

    Customize Your Own Weight Training Program That Will Perfectly Compliment Your Grappling and Help You Take Your Training to The Next Level With Dr. Mike Israetel
    • Develop and customize an optimal strength training program that will pair perfectly with any style of grappling, featuring Dr. Mike Israetel
    • Learn how and why a perfectly crafted strength training routine can add tremendous value to your grappling toolbox
  • The B Team Bottom Game: Imparting Wrestling, Turtling, and Heisting For Superior Results by Craig Jones
    $197 $98.50
    On Sale

    The B Team Bottom Game: Imparting Wrestling, Turtling, and Heisting For Superior Results by Craig Jones

    Learn the B-Team bottom game, including how to use wrestling concepts, turtling, heisting, and more for a comprehensive system

    • Force your opponents into a new style of grappling with stand ups, 4 point positions, turtle position, and more used to create action
    • See new positions that can revolutionize your bottom game, including the reverse Z guard and the false half guard
  • Understanding The Distance On Top by Gui Mendes
    Regular price $197

    Understanding The Distance On Top by Gui Mendes

    Master The Hidden Top Game Concepts Of Distance For Passing Connections And Combinations From One Of The Most Technical And Influential Black Belts Ever, 4-Time World Champion Gui Mendes
    • Use detailed instruction on far distance, medium distance, and near distance to understand guard passing on a more complete and conceptual level
  • Tripod Passing: Beating Inside Position by Jozef Chen
    Regular price $127

    Tripod Passing: Beating Inside Position by Jozef Chen

    See why so many Fanatics tune into the ADCC qualifier Jozef Chen's material - He is articulate and simplifies complicated positions 

    • Tripod passing is a simple and functional way to pass the guard that anyone can use and has led Jozef to winning some of the biggest tournaments 
    • Whether you're a seasoned grappler or novice, this system is easy to implement 
  • The guard Retention Anthology: Around and Under by Lachlan Giles & Ariel Tabak
    Regular price $127

    The guard Retention Anthology: Around and Under by Lachlan Giles & Ariel Tabak

    Lachlan Giles and Ariel Tabak show you a total technical gameplan for keeping your guard against any over or around-style of pass

    • Defend torreandos, stack passes, leg drags, and more with tips on how to keep the guard, improve position, and get back on attack.
    • ADCC Absolute medalist Lachlan Giles teams up with his guard retention specialist and black belt Ariel Tabak for this 8-part instructional release.
  • Under Pressure: Half Butterfly Mastery by Brian Glick
    Regular price $197

    Under Pressure: Half Butterfly Mastery by Brian Glick

    World Renowned Student and Black Belt of John Danaher, Brian Glick is here to take your guard to the next level

    • The half butterfly is one of the most under utilized and effective positions in the world
    • With so many details and systematic approaches to this guard, Brian Glick makes it EASY to learn

Our Goal

BJJ Fanatics was started by a pair of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belts who know that nothing is more important for a fellow fanatic than their time on the mat. Our aim is to create a shop for BJJ Students who don't look at Jiu-Jitsu as a sport - but a lifestyle.
